summary: Retention Features Testing Complete - Challenge Winner Hero Slot and Improve Consistency CTA. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All key features verified - Challenge Winner slot shows graceful fallback when no winner exists, Improve Consistency CTA appears on story_engine completed jobs and successfully triggers improvement with success message.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlaps with content - minor visual issue (same as previous iterations)

details: GET /api/retention/challenge/winner returns correct data structure
Winner slot shows graceful fallback text when no winner exists: 'Today's challenge winner will appear soon'
data-testid='challenge-winner-slot' present on Dashboard
data-testid='winner-fallback-text' shows when no winner
Trophy badge, reason badge, Remix CTA, View CTA all have correct data-testids
POST /api/retention/improve-consistency/{job_id} endpoint working correctly
Requires authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated)
Returns 404 for non-existent jobs
Returns 403 for jobs not owned by user
Max 1 retry per job enforced (400 if already attempted)
Button appears on story_engine completed jobs with consistency_retry_count < 1
Button does NOT appear on legacy_pipeline jobs
Success message shown after clicking: 'Your characters now appear more consistent across scenes'
Analytics event tracked on click
GET /api/story-engine/user-jobs returns jobs list
Jobs include 'source' field ('story_engine' or 'legacy_pipeline')
Story engine jobs include 'consistency_retry_count' field
Legacy pipeline jobs do not have consistency_retry_count (null)
Daily Challenge banner visible on Dashboard
Shows 'TODAY'S CHALLENGE' label with 'Friendship Story' title
Join Challenge CTA button visible and functional
Hero section loads with featured story
Metrics strip visible (CONTINUE, SHARE, K-FACTOR, LIVE)
Features grid visible with creator tools
MySpace page loads with project cards
Completed section shows story_engine jobs with thumbnails
Improve Consistency button visible on eligible jobs
Success message replaces button after improvement

critical_code_review_comments: Challenge Winner Hero Slot correctly computes weighted score (remix_count * 0.6 + views * 0.4)
Graceful fallback when no winner exists - shows placeholder text instead of empty slot
Improve Consistency CTA correctly checks job.source !== 'legacy_pipeline' AND consistency_retry_count < 1
Backend enforces max 1 retry per job with clear error message
Analytics events tracked for both impression and click actions
Frontend uses correct data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Used existing story_engine jobs: 'The Painter of Stars' (261430a2) for improve consistency test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retention features (Challenge Winner Hero Slot and Improve Consistency CTA) are complete and working. Key findings: (1) Challenge winner slot shows fallback when no entries exist, (2) Improve Consistency button only appears on story_engine completed jobs with consistency_retry_count < 1, (3) After clicking Improve Consistency, the button is replaced with success message. Story engine completed job IDs for testing: 'The Painter of Stars' (261430a2-28f5-4c40-bac2-35f8d275fae7) - now has consistency_retry_count=1 after test, 'The Crystal Cave' (b95498d4) and 'The Whispering Woods' (99f9cd11) still have retry_count=0.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real - no mocking
